discussion: All LLM provider calls must be wrapped in try/catch and return the standard JSON error response because timeouts, rate limits, and provider failures are expected.
context: An API route called the model provider without handling rejected promises.

discussion: Validate API request bodies with the shared zod schemas instead of handwritten property checks so validation and types remain consistent.
context: A route manually checked required request fields.

discussion: Keep route handlers thin: parse input, call a service in lib/services, and format the response. Business logic belongs in a testable service.
context: A route handler contained business rules and database orchestration inline.

discussion: API route folder names use kebab-case, never camelCase, to match the repository routing convention.
context: A new route directory was named chatHistory.

discussion: Never pass a client-supplied model name directly to a provider. Validate it against SUPPORTED_MODELS and reject unsupported models.
context: The request body selected any model string.

discussion: Use React Query for server-state fetching instead of useEffect plus useState so caching, retries, and loading states stay consistent.
context: A component fetched profile data in useEffect.

discussion: Database operations that update the order and inventory together must run in one transaction so partial writes cannot leave inconsistent state.
context: The service performed two dependent writes separately.

discussion: Authorization must be enforced in the server route even when the UI hides the action. Client-side visibility is not an access-control boundary.
context: An admin action relied only on a hidden client button.

discussion: Use the shared structured logger with an event name and fields; do not add console.log statements in request paths.
context: A request handler logged free-form strings.

discussion: Never include tokens, credentials, or raw provider payloads in logs or error responses. Log a redacted request identifier instead.
context: An error handler serialized the provider request including its token.
